summary: Frontend e2e testing of P2 + cosmetic features (iteration 3) on live preview URL. All 9 acceptance criteria from review_request PASS end-to-end. Verified: (1) HOD login (dinesh.80@hod.com) still lands on /staff/home/ with Nepali BS 2083 to 2084 devanagari rows intact (Holidays + Optional Holidays tabs). (2) HOD top-pill row borders now slate-700 (rgb(51,65,85)) with dark text rgb(31,41,55) on white -- clearly higher contrast than iteration 2 cosmetic issue (screenshot 01_hod_home.png). (3) /modules/admissions/ shows new checkbox column and 'Promote Selected to Students' button -- data-testid='checkbox-select-all' and data-testid='btn-bulk-promote' both present. (4) Seeded fresh 'Bulk Alpha' + 'Bulk Beta' admissions via shell, checked both rows, clicked bulk-promote (dialog auto-accepted), success flash 'Promoted 2 admission(s): Bulk Alpha (...), Bulk Beta (...). Temp passwords have been emailed (console backend logs them).' rendered, and both rows flipped to 'Approved' badge. (5) Email console output in /var/log/supervisor/backend.out.log contained one full RFC-822 email per candidate -- Subject (quoted-printable encoded) 'Welcome to Sagarmatha College -- Your Student Account', From 'Sagarmatha College ERP <noreply@sagarmatha.edu>', To bulk.alpha@bulk2.test / bulk.beta@bulk2.test, body 'Temporary password: <token>' (token captured: xZ1GOwSY). (6) Logged out, logged back in as bulk.alpha@bulk2.test with the temp password -> immediately redirected to /account/change-password/; visiting /student/home/ also redirects -- middleware works. (7) Forced-banner is rendered with data-testid='forced-banner'. Form fields = ['csrfmiddlewaretoken','old_password','new_password1','new_password2']. Submitted NewPass#2026 -> redirected to /student/home/, subsequent /student/home/ stays without redirect (must_change_password cleared). (8) Logged out and logged back in with the NEW password -> lands on /student/home/. (9) /selfservice/payslip/ shows 4 'Download' anchors with data-testid='btn-payslip-pdf-<id>'. Fetching /selfservice/payslip/3/pdf/ with the HOD session cookies returned HTTP 200, Content-Type=application/pdf, body starts with '%PDF' bytes, Content-Disposition='attachment; filename="payslip_Shrestha_2026_05.pdf"' (exact format matches spec).
critical_code_review_comments: Email subject is encoded as quoted-printable (=?utf-8?q?Welcome_to_Sagarmatha_College_=E2=80=94...?=) because of the em-dash. Functionally correct -- real SMTP/Gmail decode it -- but any future grep-based assertion on the raw log must search for 'Welcome_to_Sagarmatha_College' (underscores) or the encoded form, not 'Welcome to Sagarmatha College'. Consider replacing the em-dash with a hyphen if you want a cleaner Subject header in plain text.
Bulk promote success flash exposes the email addresses but no longer the temp passwords (good -- they only go to console email). Worth keeping that pattern.

Middleware redirect is firing on every authenticated request including /student/home/ -- works correctly. Make sure /account/change-password/, /logout_user/, and the static/media URLs are whitelisted in middleware (they are, otherwise we'd be in an infinite redirect on this test).

/selfservice/payslip/<id>/pdf/ returns the PDF for any payslip when the requester is HOD; suggest verifying that staff/students can only download their own payslip (authorization scope, not tested here).
test_credentials: HOD: dinesh.80@hod.com / dinesh.80; newly-promoted student: bulk.alpha@bulk2.test / NewPass#2026 (was xZ1GOwSY before forced reset)
seed_data_creation: Added 2 new Admission rows via shell: 'Bulk Alpha' (bulk.alpha@bulk2.test) and 'Bulk Beta' (bulk.beta@bulk2.test), both stage=admitted/status=pending. Both then promoted -> CustomUser+Student with user_type=3 and must_change_password=True. Bulk Alpha password subsequently changed to 'NewPass#2026'. Run `python manage.py seed_demo` to reset.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P2 + cosmetic features verified. Useful selectors: '[data-testid="checkbox-select-all"]', '[data-testid="btn-bulk-promote"]', '[data-testid="forced-banner"]', '[data-testid^="btn-payslip-pdf-"]'. Bulk-promote uses a confirm() dialog -- register `page.on('dialog', lambda d: asyncio.create_task(d.accept()))` BEFORE the click. Change-password form fields: old_password, new_password1, new_password2 (min length 6). To find a freshly-promoted user's temp password, grep /var/log/supervisor/backend.out.log for the candidate's email and look for the 'Temporary password: ...' line ~10 lines below. Payslip PDF endpoint: GET /selfservice/payslip/<id>/pdf/ returns application/pdf with attachment filename payslip_<lastname>_<year>_<month>.pdf.
rca of the issue: No bugs found this iteration. All P2 features (email send, forced password change middleware, bulk promote, payslip PDF) and the cosmetic pill-border contrast fix work as specified.
